value.found_quote: Hosted shell containers managed by OpenAI. ... Use `container_auto` when you want OpenAI to provision and manage a container for the request.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Hosted shell containers managed by OpenAI" as one of the two shell execution modes, and further explains that using `container_auto` causes OpenAI to "provision and manage a container for the request." This directly substantiates the claim that OpenAI provisions and manages sandboxed shell containers on its infrastructure, allowing agent shell commands to run without self-hosting. The page presents this as a currently available, generally accessible feature (not preview or beta).
